hooks.command:
cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; OUTPUT=$(npm test 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg out "$OUTPUT" '{decision:"block", reason: ("Tests are failing. Fix them before stopping.

" + $out)}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // ""' | { read -r f; if [ "$(basename "$f")" = "invoice.csv" ]; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "invoice.csv is a protected source-of-truth file and must not be modified by the agent."}}'; fi; }

COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'invoice\.csv' && echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE '(>|>>|\bsed[[:space:]]+-i|\brm[[:space:]]|\bmv[[:space:]]|\bcp[[:space:]]|\btruncate\b|\btee[[:space:]]|\bdd[[:space:]])'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "invoice.csv is a protected source-of-truth file and must not be modified by the agent."}}'; fi
